steps.t: After collecting the lizard corpse, you are prepared to draw the jackal matron, Zukhâma, from her den. Make your way to the jackal den west of Jirush.
Zukhâma, the jackal matron, bows her head in defeat. You should take the opportunity to place a thong around the beast and bring her to Galamê at Jiru…
Return to Galamê at Jirush with the captured jackal matron, Zukhâma. He will see you rewarded for acquiring a new guardian for Lord Igbâl.
